message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Send review feedback directly to Marty now">
Important: Marty has not yet received your formal review feedback on his product discovery documents. Please read the documents he created (docs/gtd-product-discovery.md, PROJECT.md, docs/user-stories.md, docs/glossary.md, docs/future-ideas.md) and send your review feedback DIRECTLY TO marty-cagan. Include:

1. Your approval or concerns from your area of expertise
2. Your answers to his open questions (default contexts, completed actions location, migration strategy, quick capture placement)
3. Any specific changes you'd like to see in the documents

We need all 9 team members to reach consensus before we can finalize. Please send your reviews to marty-cagan now.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already read all five documents and sent my detailed review to Marty in my previous message. Let me confirm this with the team lead.

input.content:
I already sent my full review directly to marty-cagan in my previous message. It covered:

1. **Approval** of the overall V1 scope and implementation order from a design perspective
2. **All four open questions answered** with specific design rationale (default contexts, completed actions, migration, quick capture)
3. **Design feedback on each user story** (US-GTD-1 through US-GTD-8)
4. **One specific document change request**: I recommended dropping `@office` from the default contexts list (5 defaults instead of 6)
5. **New component proposal**: Dashboard stat cards for US-GTD-8

The message was sent to marty-cagan and should be in his inbox. No additional review needed from me -- my feedback is already delivered.
input.summary: Already sent full review to Marty, confirming delivery

routing.summary: Already sent full review to Marty, confirming delivery
